response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack software craftsman with strong testing discipline and broad polyglot experience, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and primarily JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang work since. There is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers, or large-scale distributed compute infrastructure ownership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Polyglot engineer who has shipped low-latency micro-services handling millions of requests per second (DLang at Sociomantic)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and open-source platform leadership (GISCollective)
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming — only ~6 months of documented C/C++ work at National Instruments
No evidence of cloud compute platform architecture or production cloud infrastructure leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers at the scope this position requires

key_factors.factor: Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring track record
